company.what_they_do: RedCentric (redcentric.site) presents itself as a professional recruitment and staffing agency offering worldwide placement and 'strategic hiring for long-term business growth.' It is a very small, thin-web-presence entity — the homepage contains only a brief tagline with no further detail about team, clients, specializations, or founding story. It is NOT the same as the well-known UK IT managed services company Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com), which is a publicly traded company on the London Stock Exchange providing managed IT services (cloud, networking, cybersecurity, connectivity) to public and private sector clients across the UK.
